input.context: Apply building-an-exo v1.3.0 (ExO 3.0) to Humanly Communities to make it the best ExO it can be; fuse with the org-singularity Core Thesis analysis.

output.summary: Direct-Mode ExO 3.0 assessment + REWRITE roadmap for Humanly Communities. DRIVE 10/25 (GOVERN-capped 13), SHAPE 15/25, Four Pillars ~1, Miura-Ko L1, Readiness ~32/80. Asset-heavy resolved (Haier proof; SCALE/IDEAS retired). AI is a garnish not an operating core; reconciled via 'real estate sets the floor, intelligence sets the slope.' MTP 3-layer protocol drafted; Wave 1 = AI land-sourcing in shadow mode with falling-override-rate as the test. MD+HTML.
